detectors.description:
ClicksYieldRouter.getMorphoAPY() (contracts/ClicksYieldRouter.sol#254-276) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- utilization = (uint256(totalBorrowAssets) * 1e18) / totalSupplyAssets (contracts/ClicksYieldRouter.sol#271)
	- apyBps = (utilization * 1500) / 1e18 (contracts/ClicksYieldRouter.sol#275)
